title: Minimum Number of Visited Cells in a Grid
titleCn: 网格图中最少访问的格子数

testcases.input: grid = [[3,4,2,1],[4,2,3,1],[2,1,0,0],[2,4,0,0]] Output: 4 Explanation: The image above shows one of the paths that visits exactly 4 cells.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: The image above shows one of the paths that visits exactly 4 cells.

testcases.input: grid = [[3,4,2,1],[4,2,1,1],[2,1,1,0],[3,4,1,0]] Output: 3 Explanation: The image above shows one of the paths that visits exactly 3 cells.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The image above shows one of the paths that visits exactly 3 cells.

testcases.input: grid = [[2,1,0],[1,0,0]] Output: -1 Explanation: It can be proven that no path exists.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: It can be proven that no path exists.
